calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-26-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jul-13-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq., appeared for plaintiff City National Bank, a national banking association.
No appearance by defendant Hal A. Berke, an individual.
Default was entered against defendant on May 18, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on May 18, 2010.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on July 12, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff City National Bank, a national banking association, and against the Defaulted Defendant Hal A. Berke, an individual, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $115,291.93.
Prejudgment Interest - $8,790.61.
Attorney's Fees - $2,825.00.
Costs - $455.73, for a total judgment in the amount of $127,363.27.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-21-2010 Continued To Aug-06-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-12-2010 Continued To Jun-04-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
